reference: Hi, my Thyroid Stimulating Hormone level is six point six, and I have been prescribed by my doctor to take the tablet 'Thyronorm twenty-five micrograms' daily on an empty stomach for three months. I have been experiencing irregular periods for the last six months, and that is why I underwent the thyroid test. I am getting married in another two months. By any chance, does consuming these tablets affect a woman getting pregnant, and are there any other side effects? Also, does consuming the tablet 'Deviry' to get my periods affect my uterus?
text: Hi, my thyroid stimulating hormone level is six point six, and I have been prescribed by my doctor to take the tablet Thyronorm twenty five micrograms daily on an empty stomach for two months. I have been experiencing irregular periods for the last six months, and that is why I underwent the thyroid test. I am getting married in another two months. Is there any chance that consuming these tablets affects a woman getting pregnant? And are there any other side effects? Also, does consuming the tablets give me to get my periods affect my uterus?
